newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Nextronics continues to position as a humanoid-robot connector/mechanism supplier with dedicated humanoid solution pages; next earnings August 12, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: no new evidence since Jun 9. The small, overlooked connector/mechanism supplier with explicit humanoid pages remains a credible under-covered play, but commercialization proof still matters more than generic humanoid beta. Modest down-drift in price, no thesis change - hold.
verdicts.bull: Tiny ($0.2B) overlooked connector supplier with explicit humanoid design wins - high optionality if humanoid ramps.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis unchanged; need commercialization evidence beyond positioning to re-rate.
verdicts.bear: Micro-cap with thin liquidity and unproven humanoid revenue; story-driven exposure.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Humanoid connector design wins; Aug 12 earnings
verdicts.primaryRisk: Humanoid timing slip; micro-cap liquidity / execution
